scripts.build: pnpm --filter staffing-scheduling-playground build && pnpm --filter batch-flow-scheduling-playground build && node sync-site.mjs && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/codex-wrangler XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp/codex-wrangler-cache ../staffing-scheduling-playground/node_modules/.bin/wrangler deploy --dry-run
scripts.ship: pnpm run build && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/codex-wrangler XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp/codex-wrangler-cache ../staffing-scheduling-playground/node_modules/.bin/wrangler deploy
